# ICS文件内容
ics_content = """BEGIN:VCALENDAR
VERSION:2.0
PRODID:-//Calendar//Project Sync//EN
BEGIN:VEVENT
UID:task_01_calendar-01@workspace
DTSTAMP:20260325T000000Z
DTSTART:20260331T150000Z
DTEND:20260331T160000Z
SUMMARY:Project Sync
DESCRIPTION:Discussing the Q1 roadmap
ATTENDEE:mailto:john@example.com
END:VEVENT
END:VCALENDAR
"""

# 写入workspace
workspace = "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/traces/benchmarks/minimax_m2.5/pinchbench/qinhan_junxian/20260325T115117Z/workspaces/task_01_calendar/run_01"
os.makedirs(workspace, exist_ok=True)
filepath = os.path.join(workspace, "project_sync.ics")

with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
    f.write(ics_content)

# 验证文件
print(f"Created: {filepath}")
print(f"Exists: {os.path.exists(filepath)}")
with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
    print(f"Content:\n{f.read()}")
